I'm going to say something that might upset some people. 

Journalists, academics, left-wing intellectuals – many of you are completely asleep at the wheel. We are in the middle of the most consequential technological revolution in human history, and the people who should be scrutinizing it have barely shown up.

I keep hearing the same lines. AI is bad at writing. It can't do research. It just produces slop. It's all hype, fancy auto-complete, a bubble.

A bubble, really? We're talking about the fastest-growing companies in the history of capitalism. ChatGPT went from zero to 100 million users in just 2 months. Anthropic went from $1 billion in annualized revenue in January 2025 to $30 billion in April 2026. No company in the history of software has *ever* done that.

Just fancy auto-complete, really? Just this week, Anthropic's new model Mythos found thousands of critical security vulnerabilities in every major operating system and web browser – including a bug in one of the world's most secure systems that had gone undetected for 27 years. (This barely made the news.)

Meanwhile, the skeptics have been wrong, again and again and again. Three years ago, people said AI would never be able to do physics. Now it's winning gold medals at the International Math Olympiad and solving centuries-old math problems. The skeptics said AI would never write code. Now we have AI agents that autonomously build software, and many of the best developers have stopped writing code altogether. If you want to feel this for yourself, I highly recommend you start vibecoding. It's an insane experience: suddenly being able to build whole apps and websites, even though you've never written a line of code in your whole life. 

Yes, I know, Big Tech dominates the public debate about AI. But that's partly because the rest of you got the story so spectacularly wrong. The vacuum you left got filled by people with a financial interest in downplaying the risks. 

All of this is so reminiscent of F…

Introduction: Input validation failures remain one of the most underestimated vulnerabilities in modern web applications. The discovery that a login system accepts malformed emails like `%@gmail.com` and passwords…

external.description: Introduction: Input validation failures remain one of the most underestimated vulnerabilities in modern web applications. The discovery that a login system accepts malformed emails like `%@gmail.com` and passwords containing newline characters (\n) reveals critical gaps in both client-side and server-side sanitization. Such flaws not only violate RFC 5321 (the email address specification) but also open doors to account pollution, authentication bypasses, and even SQL wildcard injection—turning seemingly “weird” inputs into real attack vectors.

images.alt:
Nanny Ogg, as undisputed matriarch, encouraged all sides indiscriminately. It was the nearest thing she had to a hobby.

The Oggs contained, in just one family, enough feuds to keep an entire Ozark of normal hillbillies going for a century.

And sometimes this encouraged a foolish outsider to join in and perhaps make an uncomplimentary remark about one Ogg to another Ogg. Whereupon every single Ogg would turn on him, every part of the family closing up together like the parts of a well-oiled, blue-steeled engine to deal instant merciless destruction to the interloper.

Ramtop people believed that the Ogg feud was a blessing. The thought of them turning their immense energy on the world in general was a terrible one. Fortunately, there was no-one an Ogg would rather fight than another Ogg. It was family.

Nanny Ogg, as undisputed matriarch, encouraged all sides indiscriminately. It was the nearest thing she had to a hobby.

The Oggs contained, in just one family, enough feuds to keep an entire Ozark of normal hillbillies going for a century.

And sometimes this encouraged a foolish outsider to join in and perhaps make an uncomplimentary remark about one Ogg to another Ogg. Whereupon every single Ogg would turn on him, every part of the family closing up together like the parts of a well-oiled, blue-steeled engine to deal instant merciless destruction to the interloper.

Ramtop people believed that the Ogg feud was a blessing. The thought of them turning their immense energy on the world in general was a terrible one. Fortunately, there was no-one an Ogg would rather fight than another Ogg. It was family.

トゲひとつで姉、妹とじゃれ合う母が、謎は謎にしたままふんわり包み込むことで抜いてしまうかもしれない慶の心のトゲでも、
不利な戦いなら兵は逃げると実戦心理の実践的真理を説く半兵衛でさえ、正面からの浅井勢には出さざるをえない、「真田丸」以来の「全力で押し通る」(意訳)の策でも、

秘伝の薬と大仰に渡すことでありそうな「ただの痒み止め」のプラシーボ効果でもなく、
(自ら伝授した)正反対の人生観で次々と成功していく秀吉を改めて認知し、その距離の遠さに「幽霊」「得体のしれぬもの」と形容したことで示される、家康が豊臣兄弟に対して感じたオカルト的な恐怖心。
#豊臣兄弟

さらに、豊臣兄弟の勧誘が単なる主人公上げではなく、むしろ織田の内情を探るという大きな目的があり、代わりに光秀に信長の家臣になれと命ずるところを見ると、
今作の義昭は本気で信長と対抗しようとしているようです。
今後の史実を踏まえると、義昭は最終回近くまで登場し続けるかもしれません。

というわけで、今回の秀逸は、
家康の無言の「薬出せ」に対する「え、あれをですか？」と怪訝な数正の顔でも、
秀吉と利家のいつもの犬猿ゲンカに秘かに参加している半兵衛のフニャー猫でも、
秀長への「自分で仲をとりなせ」に「生き延びてな」を付けた光秀のやさしさでも、
#豊臣兄弟

秀長と半兵衛の役割分担もはっきりしてきました。
半兵衛はＡＩさながらに尋ねられたことを独り言のように出力しますが判断はしません。
秀長は自分の判断で和平や調停に向けて相手に語りかけます。
おかげで、豊臣兄弟と浅井親子の対面という珍場面も作られましたが。(光秀も撃てよ)

見逃せないのは、信長の反対を理由に元亀改元をためらっていた義昭が、浅井謀反＝信長戦死と見てゴーサインを出したことです。
むろん信長の帰還で義昭のあては大きく外れますが、このあたりの愚か者でもトンチンカンでもお調子者でも自信過剰でもない義昭の戦略家ぶりは斬新です。
